title: Probing Primordial Black Holes with upcoming Radio Telescopes: a case study for LOFAR2.0, FAST Core Array and BINGO
summary: Fast Radio Bursts (FRBs) are among the most intriguing phenomena observed in radio astronomy. So far, about 130 FRB signals have been confirmed and characterized by different surveys, and the CHIME telescope has recently reported a new catalog of 4539 bursts. Therefore, these numbers are expected to increase in the coming years. The detection, or lack thereof, of lensed FRB events can be used to probe Primordial Black Holes (PBHs) as a fraction of dark matter. We investigate the potential of three upcoming radio telescopes, LOFAR2.0, FAST Core Array, and BINGO, to test the PBH scenario. We forecast that LOFAR2.0 will constrain $f_{\mathrm{PBH}} < 0.16$ for PBH masses $M_{\rm PBH}>1\,{M_{\odot}}$, while FAST Core Array and BINGO will restrict $f_{\mathrm{PBH}} < 0.39$ for $M_{\rm PBH}>10\,{M_{\odot}}$ and $M_{\rm PBH}>10^{-2}\,{M_{\odot}}$, respectively. Despite the existence of stricter constraints, FRB lensing offers an independent and complementary probe of PBHs in the Universe, which will improve in the future.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了利用快速射电暴（FRB）的透镜效应探测原初黑洞（PBH）作为暗物质候选体的潜力，并预测了LOFAR2.0、FAST Core Array和BINGO三个即将建成的射电望远镜对PBH丰度的约束能力。
AI.motivation: 快速射电暴是射电天文学中引人注目的现象，目前已确认约130个信号，CHIME望远镜最新报告了4539个爆发。这些数据预计在未来几年将持续增长。通过探测或未探测到透镜化的FRB事件，可以探索原初黑洞作为暗物质组成部分的可能性。
AI.method: 研究评估了三个即将建成的射电望远镜（LOFAR2.0、FAST Core Array和BINGO）在探测FRB透镜效应方面的潜力。通过分析这些望远镜的观测能力，预测它们对原初黑洞丰度参数f_PBH的约束范围。
AI.result: 预测LOFAR2.0将约束f_PBH < 0.16（对于质量大于1太阳质量的原初黑洞），FAST Core Array将约束f_PBH < 0.39（对于质量大于10太阳质量的原初黑洞），BINGO将约束f_PBH < 0.39（对于质量大于10^{-2}太阳质量的原初黑洞）。
AI.conclusion: 尽管存在更严格的约束条件，但FRB透镜效应为探测宇宙中的原初黑洞提供了一个独立且互补的方法，这种方法在未来将得到进一步改进。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为利用快速射电暴的透镜效应探测原初黑洞作为暗物质候选体，与用户Zotero画像中的'dark matter'和'lensing'关键词有部分匹配。但论文主要关注原初黑洞和射电望远镜，而非用户核心兴趣的星系-星系强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或高红移星系多相气体。用户核心作者均未出现，且方法（FRB透镜统计）与用户常用方法（如SINFONI、ALMA成像、强透镜建模）差异较大。因此，虽然存在泛关键词匹配，但科学问题和方法与用户主要研究领域关联较弱，评分较低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为原初黑洞和FRB透镜，与用户核心兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体）仅有边缘关联。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。论文使用FRB透镜统计约束PBH丰度，与用户常用的强透镜建模、IFU光谱、分子气体观测等方法不同。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者均不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。FRB透镜探测PBH是一个较新的方向，但用户兴趣更偏向星系物理，而非暗物质粒子候选体。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主要关注原初黑洞和射电望远镜，而非用户核心兴趣的星系-星系强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或高红移星系多相气体。用户核心作者均未出现，且方法差异较大。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 快速射电暴（FRB）是射电天文学中观测到的最引人入胜的现象之一。迄今为止，已有约130个FRB信号被不同的巡天项目确认并表征，而CHIME望远镜最近报告了一个包含4539个爆发的新目录。因此，预计这些数字在未来几年内还会增加。对透镜化FRB事件的探测（或未探测到）可用于探测作为暗物质一部分的原初黑洞（PBH）。我们研究了三个即将建成的射电望远镜——LOFAR2.0、FAST Core Array和BINGO——检验PBH情景的潜力。我们预测，对于PBH质量$M_{\rm PBH}>1\,{M_{\odot}}$，LOFAR2.0将把$f_{\mathrm{PBH}}$约束在小于0.16；而对于$M_{\rm PBH}>10\,{M_{\odot}}$和$M_{\rm PBH}>10^{-2}\,{M_{\odot}}$，FAST Core Array和BINGO将分别把$f_{\mathrm{PBH}}$限制在小于0.39。尽管存在更严格的约束，FRB透镜效应为探测宇宙中的PBH提供了一个独立且互补的探针，并且这一方法在未来将得到改进。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：尽管存在更严格的约束条件，但FRB透镜效应为探测宇宙中的原初黑洞提供了一个独立且互补的方法，这种方法在未来将得到进一步改进。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Lens plane to characterize the detectability of \(\Delta t\) with different SNR. The figure was depicted considering \(z_{L}=0\) , \(M_{L}=M_{\odot}\) , \({SNR}=5\) (dotted annulus), \({SNR}=10\) (dashed-dotted annulus), \({SNR}=15\) (dashed annulus), and \(\Delta t\) variations are scaled in \({ms}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：表征不同信噪比下 \(\Delta t\) 可探测性的透镜平面。该图在考虑 \(z_{L}=0\) 、 \(M_{L}=M_{\odot}\) 、 \({SNR}=5\) （虚线环形）、 \({SNR}=10\) （点划线环形）、 \({SNR}=15\) （短划线环形）以及 \(\Delta t\) 变化以 \({ms}\) 为单位缩放的情况下绘制。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Histogram of the recent data of 131 confirmed FRB events. The fit ( 17 ) is shown with the solid blue line. The dataset used is presented in App. A .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：近期已确认的131个FRB事件数据的直方图。拟合曲线 ( 17 ) 以蓝色实线显示。所使用的数据集见附录 A 。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Design features of the three radio telescopes considered in the forecast, and the estimated maximum number of FRBs that each radio telescope could measure in the near future.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：预测中考虑的三种射电望远镜的设计特征，以及每种射电望远镜在不久的将来可能测量的FRB最大估计数量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Total optical depth for LOFAR, FAST, and BINGO. In these graphics, we consider the best time resolution constraints for each radio telescope and \(f_{{PBH}}=1\) . The solid and dashed lines respectively correspond to the lowest and highest best time resolution in Tab. 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：LOFAR、FAST和BINGO的总光学深度。在这些图中，我们考虑了每种射电望远镜的最佳时间分辨率约束，并设 \(f_{{PBH}}=1\) 。实线和虚线分别对应表1中最低和最高的最佳时间分辨率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Forecast for the fraction of primordial black holes allowed as point lenses. Left: The colored shaded regions represent the best constraints of exclusion for LOFAR (orange), FAST (green), and BINGO (blue) using the lowest best time resolution of Tab. 1 . The gray shaded regions correspond to the highest best time resolution of Tab. 1 , instead. Right: Forecast for the fraction of primordial black holes for BINGO, considering \(N_{{FRB}}=350\) (purple), \(N_{{FRB}}=600\) (darker blue), and \(N_{{FRB}}=900\) (lighter blue). The colored shade regions represent the best constraints for \(f_{PBH}\) considering a time resolution between \(1\,\mu{s}\,-\,1\,{ms}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：对作为点透镜的原初黑洞允许占比的预测。左图：彩色阴影区域表示使用表1中最低最佳时间分辨率时，LOFAR（橙色）、FAST（绿色）和BINGO（蓝色）的最佳排除约束。灰色阴影区域则对应表1中最高的最佳时间分辨率。右图：BINGO的原初黑洞占比预测，考虑了 \(N_{{FRB}}=350\) （紫色）、 \(N_{{FRB}}=600\) （深蓝色）和 \(N_{{FRB}}=900\) （浅蓝色）。彩色阴影区域表示在时间分辨率介于 \(1\,\mu{s}\,-\,1\,{ms}\) 时对 \(f_{PBH}\) 的最佳约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Forecast for the fraction of primordial black holes allowed as point lenses with \(95\,\%\) confidence-level Poisson statistics. The colored shaded regions represent the best constraints of exclusion using the time resolution of Tab. 1 , \({SNR}=12,\,15,\,15\) , and \(N_{{FRB}}=5000,\,1500,\,1500\) for LOFAR (orange), FAST (green), and BINGO (blue), respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：基于 \(95\,\%\) 置信水平泊松统计，对作为点透镜的原初黑洞允许占比的预测。彩色阴影区域表示使用表1中的时间分辨率、 \({SNR}=12,\,15,\,15\) 以及分别针对LOFAR（橙色）、FAST（绿色）和BINGO（蓝色）的 \(N_{{FRB}}=5000,\,1500,\,1500\) 所得到的最佳排除约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Constraints on the fraction of primordial black holes from different surveys combined with our forecast. The colored shaded regions represent the best constraints of exclusion provided by FRB lensing using CHIME [ 75 ] (dark blue), SN lensing [ 139 ] (dark blue), Icarus caustic-crossing [ 96 ] (blue), OGLE [ 88 ] (light blue), Subsolar mergers [ 95 ] (purple), LIGO/VIRGO/KAGRA mergers [ 65 ] (light purple), CMB [ 115 ] (red), see also [ 8 ] . We used the public code PBHbounds [ 66 , 52 ] to plot existing constraints. The forecasts derived in this work are LOFAR (highlighted orange), FAST (highlighted green), and BINGO (highlighted blue). For the telescope constraints, we consider the lowest-best time resolution in Tab. 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：来自不同巡天项目的原初黑洞占比约束与我们的预测相结合。彩色阴影区域表示由FRB透镜效应提供的最佳排除约束，分别来自CHIME [ 75 ]（深蓝色）、超新星透镜效应 [ 139 ]（深蓝色）、伊卡洛斯尖点穿越 [ 96 ]（蓝色）、OGLE [ 88 ]（浅蓝色）、亚太阳质量并合 [ 95 ]（紫色）、LIGO/VIRGO/KAGRA并合 [ 65 ]（浅紫色）、CMB [ 115 ]（红色），另见 [ 8 ] 。我们使用公开代码PBHbounds [ 66 , 52 ] 绘制了现有约束。本工作得出的预测为LOFAR（高亮橙色）、FAST（高亮绿色）和BINGO（高亮蓝色）。对于望远镜约束，我们考虑了表1中最低的最佳时间分辨率。

title: The Impact of the Bar on Dense Gas and Star Formation in M83
comment: 15 pages, 10 figures, Accepted for publication in Publications of the Astronomical Society of Japan (PASJ)
summary: Although the relationship between molecular gas content and the star formation rate (SFR) has been extensively studied in nearby galaxies, it remains controversial whether the star formation efficiency (SFE) depends on galactic structure. In particular, whether the SFE is suppressed in the bar region compared with other structures, and the physical origin of this suppression, remain poorly understood. In this study, we investigate variations in the SFE and its physical drivers in the bar region of the nearby spiral galaxy M83, using multi-wavelength observations toward the bar and spiral arm regions on a scale of 200 pc observed with ALMA. From the molecular gas surface density derived from $^{12}$CO($J=2-1$) and $^{13}$CO($J=1-0$), the dense molecular gas surface density derived from HCN ($J = 1-0$), and the star formation rate surface density determined from extinction-corrected H$α$, we find that the SFEs in the bar region are roughly a factor of two lower than those in the spiral arm, indicating that the SFE is systematically suppressed in the bar. Moreover, we find that the SFEs of dense gas are lower in the bar than in the arm by a factor of about 0.35. These results suggest that not only the efficiency of converting bulk molecular gas into stars reduced in the bar, but the efficiency of star formation from dense gas is also lower. In addition, the CO line widths are systematically larger in the bar region and exhibit a negative correlation with both the SFE and the dense-gas SFE, consistent with the interpretation that enhanced turbulent motions hinder star formation. Although the analysis is limited to small regions of M83, our results suggest that the suppression of the SFE is related to large-scale dynamical effects on the molecular gas, such as strong shocks induced by cloud-cloud collisions and/or shear, both driven by non-circular motions in the bar.

AI.tldr: 研究发现M83星系棒状结构区域的恒星形成效率比旋臂区域低约2倍，稠密气体的恒星形成效率也降低约0.35倍，这与棒状结构中增强的湍流运动有关。
AI.motivation: 虽然分子气体含量与恒星形成率的关系在邻近星系中已有广泛研究，但恒星形成效率是否依赖于星系结构仍存在争议。特别是棒状区域的恒星形成效率是否被抑制，以及这种抑制的物理起源尚不清楚。
AI.method: 使用ALMA对M83星系棒状和旋臂区域进行200pc尺度的多波长观测，通过12CO(J=2-1)和13CO(J=1-0)推导分子气体表面密度，通过HCN(J=1-0)推导稠密分子气体表面密度，通过消光校正的Hα确定恒星形成率表面密度。
AI.result: 棒状区域的恒星形成效率比旋臂区域低约2倍，稠密气体的恒星形成效率也降低约0.35倍。CO谱线宽度在棒状区域系统性更大，且与恒星形成效率和稠密气体恒星形成效率呈负相关。
AI.conclusion: 恒星形成效率的抑制与分子气体的大尺度动力学效应有关，如云-云碰撞和/或剪切诱导的强激波，这些都由棒状结构中的非圆周运动驱动。增强的湍流运动阻碍了恒星形成。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究近邻星系M83的棒状结构对恒星形成效率的影响，属于近邻星系物理范畴。用户的核心兴趣是高红移（宇宙正午）的强引力透镜星系，特别是星系-星系强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等。虽然论文涉及稠密气体和分子气体，但研究对象（M83）和研究红移（近邻）与用户的主要兴趣领域不匹配。论文未涉及强引力透镜，也未使用用户核心作者的方法或数据。因此，相关性较低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低度匹配。论文主题为近邻星系棒状结构中的稠密气体与恒星形成，用户兴趣集中于高红移强引力透镜星系。仅有'稠密气体'和'分子气体'等泛关键词重叠，但红移和科学问题差异巨大。
recommendation.method_fit: 低度匹配。论文使用ALMA多谱线观测（CO、HCN、Hα）研究近邻星系，用户兴趣涉及高红移星系动力学和强引力透镜建模，方法学上无直接关联。
recommendation.author_fit: 无匹配。论文作者Tianyi GU和Yoshimasa Watanabe均不在用户的核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等。论文揭示了棒状结构对恒星形成效率的抑制机制，在近邻星系领域有一定新颖性，但对用户的高红移透镜研究领域贡献有限。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文研究近邻星系M83，与用户主要关注的高红移（宇宙正午）强引力透镜星系不相关。未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或多相气体等核心主题。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 尽管分子气体含量与恒星形成率（SFR）之间的关系已在近邻星系中得到广泛研究，但恒星形成效率（SFE）是否依赖于星系结构仍存在争议。特别是，棒状区域中的SFE是否比其他结构中的SFE受到抑制，以及这种抑制的物理起源，仍然知之甚少。在本研究中，我们利用ALMA在200 pc尺度上对近邻旋涡星系M83的棒状和旋臂区域进行的多波段观测，研究了该星系棒状区域中SFE的变化及其物理驱动因素。根据从$^{12}$CO($J=2-1$)和$^{13}$CO($J=1-0$)导出的分子气体面密度、从HCN ($J = 1-0$)导出的稠密分子气体面密度以及由消光校正后的H$α$确定的恒星形成率面密度，我们发现棒状区域中的SFE大约是旋臂区域中的两倍，表明棒状区域中的SFE受到了系统性抑制。此外，我们发现棒状区域中稠密气体的SFE比旋臂区域低约0.35倍。这些结果表明，在棒状区域中，不仅将整体分子气体转化为恒星的效率降低，而且从稠密气体形成恒星的效率也较低。此外，CO谱线宽度在棒状区域中系统性更大，并且与SFE和稠密气体SFE均呈负相关，这与增强的湍流运动阻碍恒星形成的解释一致。尽管分析仅限于M83的小区域，但我们的结果表明，SFE的抑制与分子气体的大尺度动力学效应有关，例如由棒状结构中的非圆周运动驱动的云-云碰撞和/或剪切所诱导的强激波。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，恒星形成效率的抑制与分子气体的大尺度动力学效应有关，如云-云碰撞和/或剪切诱导的强激波，这些都由棒状结构中的非圆周运动驱动。增强的湍流运动阻碍了恒星形成。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The 12 CO(J=2-1) integrated intensity map of M83 by the PHANGS-ALMA project (Leroy et al., 2021 ) . The green and red circles are the bar and spiral arm regions, respectively, targeted in this work. Alt text: A color map showing the distribution of molecular gas across the face of the M83 galaxy. Green circles mark the bar region, and red circles mark the spiral arms region.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：PHANGS-ALMA项目（Leroy et al., 2021）获得的M83的12 CO(J=2-1)积分强度图。绿色和红色圆圈分别表示本工作瞄准的棒状和旋臂区域。替代文本：一幅彩色图，显示M83星系盘面上分子气体的分布。绿色圆圈标记棒状区域，红色圆圈标记旋臂区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Integrated intensity maps of 12 CO( \(J=2-1\) ) in (a) the arm and (b) the bar, 13 CO( \(J=1-0\) ) in (c) the arm and (d) the bar, and HCN( \(J=1-0\) ) in (e) the arm and (f) the bar, and H \(\alpha\) in (g) the arm and (h) the bar at a common spatial resolution of 9 arcsec (approximately 200 pc). The cross marks marks indicate the data points analyzed in this study. Alt text: An eight-panel grid of intensity maps. Each row compares spiral arm (left) and bar (right) regions, showing the distribution of different molecular gas tracers and H \(\alpha\) emission at a common spatial scale.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在9角秒（约200 pc）的共同空间分辨率下，(a) 臂和(b) 棒的12 CO( \(J=2-1\) )积分强度图，(c) 臂和(d) 棒的13 CO( \(J=1-0\) )积分强度图，(e) 臂和(f) 棒的HCN( \(J=1-0\) )积分强度图，以及(g) 臂和(h) 棒的H \(\alpha\) 积分强度图。十字标记表示本研究中分析的数据点。替代文本：一个八面板的强度图网格。每行比较旋臂（左）和棒状（右）区域，显示在共同空间尺度下不同分子气体示踪物和H \(\alpha\) 发射的分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Correlation plots between \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) and molecular gas surface densities in M83. (a) \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) versus \(\Sigma_{mol}({{}^{12}CO})\) (b) \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) versus \(\Sigma_{mol}({{}^{13}CO})\) , and (c) \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) versus \(\Sigma_{{dense}}\) . The bar regions are shown in green, and the spiral arm regions in red. Triangle symbols indicate data points with upper limits on \(\Sigma_{{dense}}\) . R denotes the Pearson correlation coefficient. Alt text: Three scatter plots arranged horizontally. Each plot shows data points with green for bar regions and red for spiral arm regions, plotting SFR density against different molecular gas density tracers. Triangles denote upper limit measurements.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：M83中\(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) 与分子气体面密度的相关性图。(a) \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) 与\(\Sigma_{mol}({{}^{12}CO})\) 的关系，(b) \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) 与\(\Sigma_{mol}({{}^{13}CO})\) 的关系，以及(c) \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) 与\(\Sigma_{{dense}}\) 的关系。棒状区域以绿色显示，旋臂区域以红色显示。三角形符号表示\(\Sigma_{{dense}}\) 的上限数据点。R表示皮尔逊相关系数。替代文本：三个水平排列的散点图。每个图显示数据点，绿色代表棒状区域，红色代表旋臂区域，绘制了SFR面密度与不同分子气体密度示踪物的关系。三角形表示上限测量值。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Average values of the SFE and \(\sigma_{v}\) in the arm and bar regions
figures.caption_zh: 表1：臂和棒状区域中SFE和\(\sigma_{v}\) 的平均值

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Relationship between CO linewidth and star formation efficiency in M83. (a) \(\sigma_{v}(^{13}{CO})\) versus SFE( 13 CO), (b) \(\sigma_{v}(^{12}{CO})\) versus SFE( 12 CO). (c) \(\sigma_{v}(^{13}{CO})\) versus SFE dense and (d) \(\sigma_{v}(^{12}{CO})\) versus SFE dense . The bar, spiral arm are indicated in green and red, respectively. The inverted triangular symbols show lower limits on SFE dense . R indicates the value of the Pearson correlation coefficient. A negative correlation is seen in all plots, indicating that the SFE is systematically lower in regions with broader line widths. Alt text: A four-panel grid of scatter plots. The left column plots 13 CO( \(J=1-0\) ) line width against two star formation efficiency measures, and the right column plots 12 CO( \(J=2-1\) ) line width against the same two efficiency measures. Red points represent arm regions, and green points represent bar regions.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：M83中CO谱线宽度与恒星形成效率的关系。(a) \(\sigma_{v}(^{13}{CO})\) 与SFE( 13 CO)的关系，(b) \(\sigma_{v}(^{12}{CO})\) 与SFE( 12 CO)的关系，(c) \(\sigma_{v}(^{13}{CO})\) 与SFE dense 的关系，以及(d) \(\sigma_{v}(^{12}{CO})\) 与SFE dense 的关系。棒状区域和旋臂区域分别以绿色和红色表示。倒三角符号表示SFE dense 的下限。R表示皮尔逊相关系数的值。所有图中均观察到负相关，表明在谱线宽度更宽的区域，SFE系统性更低。替代文本：一个四面板的散点图网格。左列绘制13 CO( \(J=1-0\) )谱线宽度与两种恒星形成效率度量的关系，右列绘制12 CO( \(J=2-1\) )谱线宽度与相同两种效率度量的关系。红点代表臂区域，绿点代表棒状区域。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: List of Additional Physical Properties
figures.caption_zh: 表2：附加物理性质列表

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Numerical contributions to the dynamical equilibrium pressure.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：动力学平衡压力的数值贡献。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Relationships between (a) \(I_{{HCN}}/I_{{}^{12}{CO}(2-1)}\) ratio, (b) SFE dense , and (c) SFE( \({}^{12}{CO}\) ) as a function of \(P_{{DE}}\) in M83. Data points for the bar and spiral arm regions are shown as green squares and red circles, respectively. The inverted triangles indicate data points with upper limits on the \(I_{{HCN}}/I_{{}^{12}{CO}(2-1)}\) in (a) and lower limits on the SFE dense in (b). R indicates the value of the Pearson correlation coefficient. The SFE dense in the bar region is systematically lower than in the arm region across nearly the entire pressure range, indicating suppressed efficiency of star formation from dense gas within the bar. Alt text: Three scatter plots arranged side by side, each plotting a different parameter against the \(P_{\text{DE}}\) . green squares represent the bar region, and red circles represent the spiral arm region.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：M83中(a) \(I_{{HCN}}/I_{{}^{12}{CO}(2-1)}\) 比值、(b) SFE dense 和(c) SFE( \({}^{12}{CO}\) ) 作为\(P_{{DE}}\) 函数的关系。棒状区域和旋臂区域的数据点分别以绿色方块和红色圆圈显示。倒三角表示(a)中\(I_{{HCN}}/I_{{}^{12}{CO}(2-1)}\) 的上限数据点和(b)中SFE dense 的下限数据点。R表示皮尔逊相关系数的值。在几乎整个压力范围内，棒状区域中的SFE dense 系统性低于臂区域，表明棒状区域内稠密气体形成恒星的效率受到抑制。替代文本：三个并排排列的散点图，每个图绘制不同参数与\(P_{\text{DE}}\) 的关系。绿色方块代表棒状区域，红色圆圈代表旋臂区域。

title: The hydrodynamical response of cold circumgalactic clouds to quasar radiation
comment: 13 pages + 6 appendix pages, 10 + 5 figures, submitted to A&A
summary: Recent simulations increasingly resolve the small-scale structure of the circumgalactic medium (CGM), but the dynamical impact of ionising radiation on its cold $10^4$ K component remains poorly understood. We investigate the evolution of cold gas structures exposed to quasars' EUV radiation. We develop an analytical framework to describe the evolution of such clouds, introducing a new threshold that defines when a cloud becomes radiation-shielded. The framework is validated using radiation-hydrodynamic simulations of single static clouds. It predicts three evolutionary paths: (i) an optically thin regime, in which radiation uniformly ionises the cloud; (ii) a radiation-shielded regime, where the cloud remains largely unaffected; and (iii) a rocket-effect regime, in which the propagation of the ionisation front ionises the illuminated side while compressing the opposite side, later accelerating the surviving cold clump. In the latter regime, the cloud's Ly$α$ luminosity can be up to one order of magnitude higher than the optically thin case. Such luminosities are as high as $70\%$ of the values obtained from a fluorescent regime without considering hydrodynamical response. Unless the cloud is shielded, at least $\sim 50$-$60\,\%$ of Ly$α$ emission arises from recombination. Applying this framework to both a ray crossing a population of clouds, and a ray propagating inside a cold stream, we find that the cold CGM around bright quasars ($L_{\mathrm{ν,LL}} \sim 10^{31.6} \, \mathrm{erg\, s^{-1}\, Hz^{-1}}$) is likely fully ionised, whereas the one around faint quasars ($L_{\mathrm{ν,LL}} \sim 10^{28.6} \, \mathrm{erg\, s^{-1}\, Hz^{-1}}$) predominantly experiences a rocket-effect regime. These results imply that the hydrodynamical response of cold CGM structures to quasar radiation must be considered when deriving their physical properties, particularly for faint quasars.

AI.tldr: 研究类星体EUV辐射对冷气体云的动力学影响，提出了描述其演化的分析框架，预测了三种演化路径，并发现辐射对冷CGM的影响取决于类星体亮度。
AI.motivation: 虽然模拟越来越能解析星系际介质的精细结构，但电离辐射对其冷气体成分的动力学影响仍不清楚。需要理解类星体EUV辐射如何影响冷气体云，这对解释观测到的Lyα发射至关重要。
AI.method: 开发了一个分析框架来描述冷气体云在辐射下的演化，引入了辐射屏蔽阈值概念。通过辐射流体动力学模拟验证该框架，并应用于穿越云群的光线和冷流内部传播的光线两种情况。
AI.result: 预测了三种演化路径：光学薄、辐射屏蔽和火箭效应。在火箭效应下，Lyα光度可比光学薄情况高一个数量级。亮类星体周围的冷CGM可能完全电离，而暗类星体周围主要经历火箭效应。
AI.conclusion: 在推导冷CGM结构的物理性质时，必须考虑其对类星体辐射的流体动力学响应，特别是对于暗类星体。辐射屏蔽条件对Lyα发射来源有重要影响。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为类星体辐射对冷CGM云的流体动力学响应，与用户Zotero画像中的'cold gas'关键词有部分匹配，但用户核心兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学和运动学，而本文不涉及引力透镜、高红移星系或核心作者，且方法为辐射流体模拟而非透镜研究，因此相关性较低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低度匹配。仅与'cold gas'关键词部分吻合，但用户主要关注强引力透镜和高红移星系，本文主题偏离较远。
recommendation.method_fit: 低度匹配。本文使用辐射流体动力学模拟，而用户兴趣集中在引力透镜建模和观测分析，方法差异大。
recommendation.author_fit: 无匹配。作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等。论文提出了冷云演化的新分析框架，但创新点不在用户核心领域。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文不涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或运动学，且无核心作者参与，与用户主要研究方向脱节。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 最近的模拟越来越精细地解析了星系周介质（CGM）的小尺度结构，但其冷组分（$10^4$ K）受到电离辐射的动力学影响仍知之甚少。我们研究了暴露于类星体极紫外（EUV）辐射下的冷气体结构的演化。我们建立了一个分析框架来描述此类云团的演化，引入了一个新的阈值来定义云团何时受到辐射屏蔽。该框架通过单个静态云团的辐射流体动力学模拟得到了验证。它预测了三种演化路径：(i) 光学薄状态，其中辐射均匀电离云团；(ii) 辐射屏蔽状态，其中云团基本不受影响；(iii) 火箭效应状态，其中电离锋的传播电离了被照射侧，同时压缩了相对侧，随后加速了幸存下来的冷团块。在最后一种状态下，云团的Ly$α$光度可比光学薄情况高出一个数量级。这样的光度高达不考虑流体动力学响应的荧光状态所得值的$70\%$。除非云团被屏蔽，否则至少$\sim 50$-$60\,\%$的Ly$α$发射来自复合过程。将该框架应用于穿过一群云团的射线以及穿过冷流内部的射线，我们发现明亮类星体（$L_{\mathrm{ν,LL}} \sim 10^{31.6} \, \mathrm{erg\, s^{-1}\, Hz^{-1}}$）周围的冷CGM很可能被完全电离，而暗弱类星体（$L_{\mathrm{ν,LL}} \sim 10^{28.6} \, \mathrm{erg\, s^{-1}\, Hz^{-1}}$）周围的冷CGM则主要经历火箭效应状态。这些结果表明，在推导冷CGM结构的物理性质时，必须考虑其对类星体辐射的流体动力学响应，特别是对于暗弱类星体。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：在推导冷CGM结构的物理性质时，必须考虑其对类星体辐射的流体动力学响应，特别是对于暗类星体。辐射屏蔽条件对Lyα发射来源有重要影响。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Illustration of the different evolutionary paths of the cloud illuminated by a quasar. Starting from an initial neutral cloud which is suddenly illuminated by extreme UV (EUV) radiation at an infinitesimal time \(\delta t\) . The Strömgren number \({St}\propto r_{{c,0}}n_{{H,0}}^{2}F_{{q}}^{-1}\) (equation 2 ) defines the cloud’s evolution as described in Sec. 2 . The cloud follows three characteristic regimes: an optically thin regime, a rocket-effect regime, and a radiation-shielded regime.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：受类星体照射的云团不同演化路径的示意图。从一个初始中性云团开始，该云团在无穷小时间 \(\delta t\) 内突然受到极紫外（EUV）辐射照射。斯特龙根数 \({St}\propto r_{{c,0}}n_{{H,0}}^{2}F_{{q}}^{-1}\) （方程2）定义了云团的演化，如第2节所述。云团遵循三种特征状态：光学薄状态、火箭效应状态和辐射屏蔽状态。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : \({St}\) (dotted-black) and \(\Upsilon\) (dashed-grey) parameter contour lines for typical values of \(n_{{H,0}}\) and \(F_{{q}}\) in the CGM and a cloud radius of \(50\,{pc}\) . The left y-axis shows the corresponding quasar Lyman-Limit specific luminosities \(L_{{\nu,LL}}\) assuming a cloud at a distance of \(10\,pkpc\) from the quasar. Red dots represent the simulation’s initial parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：对于CGM中 \(n_{{H,0}}\) 和 \(F_{{q}}\) 的典型值以及云团半径 \(50\,{pc}\) ，\({St}\) （黑色虚线）和 \(\Upsilon\) （灰色虚线）参数的等高线。左侧y轴显示对应的类星体莱曼限比光度 \(L_{{\nu,LL}}\) ，假设云团距离类星体 \(10\,pkpc\) 。红点代表模拟的初始参数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Temperature colour maps slices. Cloud evolution at \(t=3,6,\) and \(20\,{Myr}\) for five representative simulations with different values of \({St}\) (equation 2 ), the ratio of the recombination time over the ionisation front crossing time in the cold cloud, at fixed \(\Upsilon\sim 10^{8}\) . In all maps, the quasar radiation enters from the bottom-left corner as shown by the yellow arrow.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：温度色图切片。在 \(t=3,6,\) 和 \(20\,{Myr}\) 时刻，五个具有不同 \({St}\) 值（方程2）的代表性模拟的云团演化，\({St}\) 是冷云团中复合时间与电离锋穿越时间之比，固定 \(\Upsilon\sim 10^{8}\) 。在所有图中，类星体辐射从左下角进入，如黄色箭头所示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Same as Fig. 3 , but for different values of the ionisation strength parameter \(\Upsilon\) at fixed \({St}\sim 8\) (rocket-effect regime).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图3相同，但针对固定 \({St}\sim 8\) （火箭效应状态）下不同的电离强度参数 \(\Upsilon\) 值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Cold gas mean temperature (top) and number density evolution (bottom). Left panels: Simulations at a fixed \(\Upsilon\sim 10^{8}\) (equation 7 ) and various ratios \({St}\) (equation 2 ). Simulations with clouds in the optically thin, radiation-shielded, and rocket-effect regimes are represented by dashed, dotted and plain lines, respectively. Right panels: Simulations at a fixed \({St}\sim 8\) (rocket-effect regime) with varying ionisation strength parameter \(\Upsilon\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：冷气体平均温度（上）和数密度演化（下）。左图：固定 \(\Upsilon\sim 10^{8}\) （方程7）和不同比值 \({St}\) （方程2）的模拟。处于光学薄、辐射屏蔽和火箭效应状态的云团模拟分别用虚线、点线和实线表示。右图：固定 \({St}\sim 8\) （火箭效应状态）下具有不同电离强度参数 \(\Upsilon\) 的模拟。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Cold gas hydrogen number density PDFs weighted by density, normalised by \(n_{{H,0}}\) and averaged over \(t\in[5,20]\,Myr\) . The top, middle, and bottom panels are simulations in the optically thin, rocket-effect and radiation-shielded regimes, respectively. Each line represents one simulation defined by a unique pair of \(\left({St},\Upsilon\right)\) . The parameters \({St}\) and \(\Upsilon\) are represented in the two-dimensional colour map through colour variation and enforced white/black saturation, respectively. All simulations are shown except in the rocket-effect regimes, where, for clarity, only simulations with \(\Upsilon\sim 10^{8}\) are plotted.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：冷气体氢数密度概率密度函数（PDF），按密度加权，归一化至 \(n_{{H,0}}\) ，并在 \(t\in[5,20]\,Myr\) 上平均。上、中、下图分别对应光学薄、火箭效应和辐射屏蔽状态下的模拟。每条线代表一个由唯一一对 \(\left({St},\Upsilon\right)\) 定义的模拟。参数 \({St}\) 和 \(\Upsilon\) 在二维色图中分别通过颜色变化和强制白/黑饱和度表示。除火箭效应状态外，所有模拟均显示；在火箭效应状态中，为清晰起见，仅绘制了 \(\Upsilon\sim 10^{8}\) 的模拟。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Cold-gas hydrogen number density PDFs weighted by number density and normalised to \(n_{H,0}\) , averaged over \(t\in[5,20]\,Myr\) . Plain, dashed, and dotted lines show total, neutral, and ionised hydrogen, respectively. The top, middle, and bottom panels show representative simulations in the optically thin, rocket-effect, and radiation-shielded regimes. Colours match those in Fig. 6 .
figures.caption_zh: 图7：冷气体氢数密度概率密度函数（PDF），按数密度加权，归一化至 \(n_{H,0}\) ，并在 \(t\in[5,20]\,Myr\) 上平均。实线、虚线和点线分别表示总氢、中性氢和电离氢。上、中、下图显示了光学薄、火箭效应和辐射屏蔽状态下的代表性模拟。颜色与图6一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8 : Resulting cold gas clumping factor due to the effect of quasar radiation of the cold hydrogen gas, averaged over \(t\in[5,20]\,Myr\) for all simulations. Each circle represents a simulation positioned according to its parameters \({St}\) (x-axis) and \(\Upsilon\) (colour map). Top panel: Clumping factor of cold H I gas. Bottom panel: Clumping factor of cold H II gas.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：由于类星体辐射对冷氢气的影响，所有模拟在 \(t\in[5,20]\,Myr\) 上平均的冷气体团簇因子。每个圆圈代表一个模拟，根据其参数 \({St}\) （x轴）和 \(\Upsilon\) （色图）定位。上图：冷H I气体的团簇因子。下图：冷H II气体的团簇因子。
